title: Delegation Decision Result
description: Platform-level schema for a delegation decision result within the PDP Decision Envelope. See docs/delegation-decision.md for full semantics, protection conditions, and customization boundaries.

delegate.description: Whether to delegate to a subagent. When false, other fields may be omitted.

mode.description: Recommended collaboration mode. Platform default is 'supervisor-worker'. Other values: 'handoff', 'team', 'swarm', 'subgraph'.

scope_summary.description: Brief description of the delegation scope. Should align with the subsequent Subagent Contract's scope field.

worker_only.description: Whether the subagent is restricted to bounded worker role. When true, subagent must not modify authoritative docs, global status boards, or active handoffs.

requires_review.description: Whether the subagent output must go through review/approve before integration.

allow_handoff.description: Whether handoff (control transfer) is permitted. Default: false.

allowed_artifacts.description: Recommended list of artifacts the subagent may modify.

required_refs.description: Recommended list of reference documents the subagent must read.

out_of_scope.description: Recommended list of explicitly excluded scope items.

rejection_reason.description: Reason for refusing delegation. Present when delegate is false.

review_gate_level.description: Suggested gate level for reviewing subagent output. Only 'review' or 'approve' are valid (inform is not applicable for subagent output review).

capability_warnings.description: Advisory warnings emitted when the available merged provides do not cover the capabilities typically required by the delegated intent.
